The '''Ministry of Intelligence''' was responsible for civilian management of all intelligence in the [[Five Worlds]], which presumably gave it at least partial oversight of [[CorSec Intelligence]]. It was headed by the [[Minister of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|Minister of Intelligence]], who was a member of the [[High Cabinet]]. [[Gavele Lemora]] was Minister during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
